sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n101290" key="su/rragma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σύρραγμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n101290.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">conflict</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μάχης</foreign> cj. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σύγγραμμα</foreign> in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.346e</biblScope> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σύρρηγμα</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
